headlines.title: Oil prices climb back toward $100, and US stocks halt their record-breaking rally
Anthropic Raises Stakes in Wall Street’s IPO Gold Rush
Google must let UK publishers opt out of AI search under new rules
Is Sherwin-Williams Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
Bitcoin crash triggers billions in liquidations
Daily Spotlight: Stock Market Valuation in "Normal" Range
The $10 Trillion Bet: Why Insiders Think SpaceX Could Rival Apple by Decade’s End
Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales last year
CrowdStrike Falls On Earnings As Guidance Underwhelms Amid Big 2026 Gain
An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
headlines.desc: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.

headlines.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
headlines.desc: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

headlines.title: Crypto companies are trying to leave the hype cycle for a more disciplined phase, earnings show
headlines.desc: Crypto companies spent years monetizing volatility. Now they're trying to survive without it.

headlines.title: Software stocks are crashing up. Here are the winners
headlines.desc: The rally in software stocks has gone from recovery to raging bull market, and traders are betting there's more to come.

headlines.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
headlines.desc: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

headlines.title: Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
headlines.desc: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Amid ongoing uncertainty, investors seeking consistent income can consider adding dividend stocks to their portfolios.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts see robust growth potential in these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Investors keen on capitalizing on the AI boom can track recommendations from top Wall Street analysts

headlines.title: How single-stock turbulence presents ‘asymmetric’ downside risk for a rather calm S&P 500
headlines.desc: A “dispersion trade” is being fueled by rising volatility for individual stocks while index volatility is falling — suggesting the risks of a selloff are rising

headlines.title: Defiance in Beirut's Hezbollah stronghold during fragile ceasefire
headlines.desc: BBC correspondent John Sudworth reports from the Beirut stronghold of Hezbollah support, Dahieh.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO hype has traders flocking to this mid-cap stock
headlines.desc: Options volume is picking up in Nasdaq-listed Echostar, a $35-billion networking business based in Colorado that owns an estimated 3% of SpaceX stock.

headlines.title: Who are the World Cup Golden Boot favourites? Mbappe, Ronaldo, Messi, Kane?
headlines.desc: There are a host of top players who could claim the coveted title of top goal scorer, including two from the same team.

headlines.title: Tech is flashing a warning sign last seen in 2020. Strategist Larry McDonald sees a massive rotation coming.
headlines.desc: Larry McDonald warns that investors are piling into tech stocks thinking it’s the “safe trade,” but should be thining about hard assets instead.

headlines.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
headlines.desc: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.

headlines.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
headlines.desc: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

headlines.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data
headlines.desc: The rally in semiconductor stocks is so incredible, traders can't help but bet against it.

headlines.title: Consumer prices rose 3.8% annually in April, the highest since May 2023
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to increase by 3.7% annually in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Kevin Warsh to be sworn in as Federal Reserve chair on Friday
headlines.desc: Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh, his hand-picked choice to lead the Federal Reserve, during a White House ceremony.

headlines.title: Software stocks stage 'mini' bull market. Some traders see more gains
headlines.desc: As semiconductor shares dragged down the Nasdaq-100 for a second day, quietly, software stocks appear to have found their groove.

headlines.title: Cybersecurity stocks are surging. One looks promising into earnings
headlines.desc: Mike Khouw is long Zscaler into earnings after the close.

headlines.title: Bitcoin trails stocks by most since 2019 as traders get their kicks elsewhere
headlines.desc: Bitcoin hasn't had this cold a winter in seven years.
